---
title: ""
page-layout: article
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="profile-section">
  <div class="profile-top">
    <div class="profile-photo">
      <img src="profile.png" alt="Marcelo Arita">
    </div>
    <div class="profile-header-text">
      <p class="profile-name">Marcelo Arita</p>
      <p class="profile-location">📍 Japan</p>
      <div class="social-links">
        <a href="https://br.linkedin.com/in/marcelo-arita" target="_blank">
          <img src="assets/linkedin.png" class="social-icon" alt="LinkedIn"> LinkedIn
        </a>
        <a href="https://github.com/marceloarita" target="_blank">
          <img src="assets/github.png" class="social-icon" alt="GitHub"> GitHub
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="profile-body">
    <p class="profile-bio">
      Data Scientist with 5 years of experience delivering data-driven solutions
      in consulting environments across multiple industries — including retail, steel,
      financial services, insurance, automotive, and subscription businesses.
    </p>
    <p class="profile-bio">
      My work spans the full analytics stack: from data engineering and predictive
      modeling to AI-powered applications. I have led and contributed to projects
      involving demand forecasting, churn prediction, dynamic pricing, LLM-based
      chatbots, and cloud data infrastructure.
    </p>
    <p class="profile-bio">
      Currently working as Senior Data Scientist at
      <a href="https://churadata.okinawa/" target="_blank">ChuraData (ちゅらデータ, Japan)</a>,
      previously at
      <a href="https://advisiaanalytics.com.br/home/" target="_blank">ADVISIA Analytics (Brazil)</a>.
      In recent projects, I have been focused on the development, training, and evaluation
      of LLM agents.
    </p>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Technical Skills

**Languages** &nbsp; Python (8+ years), SQL (5+ years)

**Machine Learning & Statistics** &nbsp; Scikit-learn, XGBoost, LightGBM, SciPy, Statsmodels, SHAP, Optuna

**AI Engineering** &nbsp; LangChain, LangGraph, RAG, Text2SQL

**Data & Engineering** &nbsp; Pandas, NumPy, Azure Data Factory, ETL pipelines, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, MySQL

**Cloud** &nbsp; Azure (Data Factory, Data Lake Gen2, OpenAI, DevOps, App Service) · AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, Bedrock) · GCP (BigQuery, VertexAI, Gemini)

**Visualization & BI** &nbsp; Power BI, Qlik Sense, Plotly, Matplotlib, Seaborn

---

## Education & Certifications

**Degree**

Bachelor's Degree in Mechanical Engineering — Escola Politécnica da USP (University of São Paulo, Brazil).
Undergraduate thesis: machine learning predictive model for energy consumption forecasting in a shopping center, with 3 months of training and 9 months of validation.

**Google Cloud**

- Professional Cloud Architect (2023)
- Professional Machine Learning Engineer (2022)
- Professional Data Engineer (2022)
- Associate Cloud Engineer (2022)

**Reinforcement Learning** — University of Alberta

- Prediction and Control with Function Approximation (2026)
- Sample-based Learning Methods (2025)
- Fundamentals of Reinforcement Learning (2025)

**AI & Machine Learning**

- AI and Machine Learning Algorithms and Techniques — Microsoft (2025)
- Foundations of AI and Machine Learning — Microsoft (2025)
- Deep Learning A-Z 2024: Neural Networks, AI & ChatGPT — Udemy (2025)
- LangGraph: Develop LLM Powered AI Agents — Udemy (2024)
- LangChain: Develop LLM Powered Applications — Udemy (2024)
- Statistics for Business Analytics and Data Science — Udemy (2024)
- Machine Learning A-Z: AI, Python & R — Udemy (2021)

**Language**

- JLPT N1 — Japanese Language Proficiency Test (2014)
